items.description: Kuaishou's flagship AI video model with text-to-video, image-to-video, native audio across 5 languages, multi-shot storytelling, and up to 15-second duration with cinematic control.

items.title: Kling 2.6 & Motion Control

items.title: Kling 2.5 Turbo
items.description: Fast AI video generation with Turbo mode for rapid iteration. Supports text-to-video and image-to-video with reliable output quality.

items.title: Kling 2.1 (Standard, Pro, Master)

capabilities.title: Kling AI Video Generation Capabilities
capabilities.description: Kling models support comprehensive AI video features for professional content creation.

items.title: Native Audio Generation
items.description: Kling 3.0 generates native audio in Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish with dialect and accent simulation support.

items.title: Multi-Shot Cinematic Storytelling
items.description: Create complex multi-shot sequences with dynamic camera movements, shot transitions, and structured narrative control.

items.title: Motion Control & Transfer
items.description: Transfer motion from reference videos to new character images while preserving facial identity and realistic movement dynamics.

items.title: Character & Scene Consistency
items.description: Maintain strong visual consistency for characters, objects, and scenes across frames, camera movements, and multi-shot sequences.

items.title: Photorealistic Output
items.description: Generate photorealistic AI videos with lifelike characters, accurate text rendering in imagery, and professional-grade visual quality.

items.title: Extended Duration Up to 15s
items.description: Kling 3.0 supports flexible video duration from 3 to 15 seconds, enabling longer narrative sequences with smooth transitions.

use-cases.description: From cinematic storytelling to product advertising, Kling powers diverse AI video creation workflows.

items.title: Game & Animation Visualization

faq.title: Kling AI Video Generator FAQ
faq.description: Frequently asked questions about Kling AI video generation models.

items.question: What is Kling AI?
items.answer: Kling AI is Kuaishou's AI video generation platform, serving over 60 million creators worldwide. Kling models support text-to-video, image-to-video, motion control, and native audio generation.

items.question: What is new in Kling 3.0?
items.answer: Kling 3.0 introduces native audio generation across 5 languages, multi-shot storytelling, extended 15-second duration, photorealistic output, and accurate text rendering in video.

items.question: What is Kling Motion Control?
items.answer: Kling Motion Control transfers movement from reference videos to character images while preserving facial identity, expressions, and realistic motion dynamics.

items.question: Can I use Kling for free?
items.answer: Yes! You can try Kling AI video generator free online with sign-up credits. No credit card required.

items.question: What languages does Kling 3.0 audio support?
items.answer: Kling 3.0 supports native audio generation in Chinese, English, Japanese, Korean, and Spanish, including dialects like Cantonese, Sichuanese, and accents like American, British, and Indian English.

cta.title: Start Generating AI Videos with Kling Free
cta.description: Sign up now and get free credits to generate your first Kling AI video — no credit card required.
